Budget.title: Budget
Budget.description: Represents the budget allocation and spending for a specific secretary portfolio.

secretaryName.description: The name of the secretary portfolio (e.g., Sports Secretary).

allocatedAmount.description: The total amount allocated to this portfolio.

description.description: A brief description of the budget usage.

lastUpdated.description: The timestamp of the last update.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system with role-based access.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles and roles.
